finding_results.notes: Tom's four reassurance beats now change with leverage: minimization/blame-shift, time-buying plea, transactional concession, and performative cash promise. Repetition of the prior reassurance formula was removed while preserving his betting/depot register and high-contraction speech.
finding_results.summary: Reworked the repeated reassurance loop into distinct tactical moves that escalate with scene pressure and avoid mechanical dialogue reuse.

summary: Revised chapter_01 dialogue cadence and idiolect for the packet finding; all required reassurance moments now use distinct wording and tactical intent.
